GENERAL_DESCRIPTION: On the General tab, tú will find useful information to facilitate túr hospital visit.
HOME_DESCRIPTION: On the Baile tab, tú will be provided with news about túr medical status, documents, hospital announcements and appointments.
IPS_DESCRIPTION_PART_1: An International Patient Summary (IPS) is a set of clinical data that provides an overview of túr health data. It lists information such as túr medical issues, medications, allergies, and more.
IPS_DESCRIPTION_PART_2: You can use túr IPS to securely share a snapshot of túr health information with clinical staff who might not otherwise have access to túr medical history, for example, when visiting a new doctor or clinic.
IPS_QR_CODE_ALT: QR code to share the patient's International Patient Summary
IPS_SHARE_DESCRIPTION_PART_1: The IPS displayed in the Réamhamharc section below can be shared via the following QR code or external link, which will
IPS_SHARE_DESCRIPTION_PART_3: If tú leave this page and come back, a new code will be generated.
IPS_SHARE_DESCRIPTION_PART_4: This QR code and link provide direct viewing access to túr patient summary. Protect them as tú would a password, or túr printed medical file.
LAB_DELAY_DEFAULTS_HEADER: The default delay parameters set by the institution are:
LAB_DELAY_DEFAULTS_INTERPRETABLE: Interpretable result ({ yesno, select, yes{yes} no{no} other{?} }) :
LAB_DELAY_INFO_TEXT: The delay parameters for lab results can be changed upon request. You can find a printable “Access to lab results” form in the Opal General tab or by making a request at the hospital.
LAB_DELAY_INTERPRETABLE: Interpretable: You will be able to interpret these results túrself after receiving instruction from túr healthcare team.
LAB_DELAY_NON_INTERPRETABLE: Níln-interpretable: These results are generally subject to interpretation by a healthcare professional and cannot be interpreted by túrself.
LAB_INFO_CRITICAL_TEXT: Your blood test results are significantly outside of the normal range. The laboratory will usually communicate these results to túr treating team in an expedited manner. Your treating team will evaluate them and will notify tú if any action needs to be taken with regards to these abnormal blood test results.
LAB_INFO_FLAGS: Toradhs outside the normal range are accompanied by (L), (H) or (C), where (L) indicates a low value, (H) indicates a high value and (C) indicates a critical value.
LAB_INFO_HIGH_LOW_TEXT: Your blood test results are outside the normal range. Your treating team will evaluate them and order further studies or treatments if necessary.
LAB_INFO_NORMAL_TEXT: Your blood test results are within the normal range.
LEAVING_APP: Nílte that tú're leaving the app and are no longer relying on Opal to protect túr document data.
LEAVING_APP_LABS: Please note that tú are leaving the app to open an external website. This site is offered for informational purposes only; don't provide any of túr personal data.
LOADING_ERROR: An error occurred while loading túr data. Please try again later.

QUESTION: Ceist
QUESTIONNAIRE_BEGIN_INSTRUCTION: Tap "Tosaigh" or swipe to the left to start the questionnaire.
QUESTIONNAIRE_CONTACT: If tú have any questions or concerns, please let túr clinical team know.
QUESTIONNAIRE_INSTRUCTIONS: Freagra the questions in red. Ceists in green can be edited. Once all questions are answered, tú can submit.
QUESTIONNAIRE_LOCKING_ERROR: This questionnaire can't be answered because another user with access to this patient's file has already started it. Once this user has completed the questionnaire, tú'll be able to view the answers on the Completed tab.
QUESTIONNAIRE_NOT_ALLOWED_TO_ANSWER: Your level of access to this patient's data does not allow answering questionnaires on their behalf. Once the questionnaire has been completed by another user, tú'll be able to view the answers on the Completed tab.
QUESTIONNAIRE_RESUME_INSTRUCTION: Tap "Lean ar aghaidh" or swipe to the left to resume the questionnaire.
QUESTIONNAIRE_SUBMIT_AS_OTHER: Cuir isteachting answers as: {userName} (on behalf of {patientName})
QUESTIONNAIRE_SUBMIT_INSTRUCTION: Please click the submit button to complete the questionnaire
QUESTIONNAIRE_THANKS: Thank tú for completing this questionnaire
REFRESH_ERROR: An error occurred while attempting to refresh túr data.
RELATIONSHIPS_CAREGIVERS_DESCRIPTION: This section lists all other users who have access to túr data in Opal. Their level of access may differ based on the type of relationship they have with tú, which will be one of the following:
RELATIONSHIPS_CAREGIVERS_ERROR: An error occurred while retrieving caregivers.
RELATIONSHIPS_CAREGIVERS_NONE: Níl caregivers are linked to túr account.
RELATIONSHIPS_ERROR: An error occurred while retrieving túr data.
RELATIONSHIPS_PATIENTS_DESCRIPTION: This section lists all patients whose data tú can access in Opal. Your level of access may differ based on the type of relationship tú have with them, which will be one of the following:
RELATIONSHIPS_PATIENTS_NONE: Níl patients are linked to túr account.
RELATIONSHIP_TYPES_ERROR: An error occurred while retrieving relationship types.
RESEARCH_DESCRIPTION: The Taighde section of Opal contains information about the research studies that tú are participating in.
RESEARCH_FEEDBACK_MESSAGE: Please use this form to provide feedback about ongoing research studies in Opal. You may also use this form to revoke túr consent for a research study that tú previously consented to using Opal.
RESEARCH_FEEDBACK_PLACEHOLDER: Provide the full name of the research study and the reason for túr feedback (general feedback or revoke consent).
SECURITY_QUESTIONS_INSTRUCTIONS: You may change one or more of túr security questions or answers here.
SECURITY_QUESTION_ALREADY_USED: This question has already been chosen
SECURITY_QUESTION_ANSWER_UPDATE_SUCCESS: Security questions and answers updated. Signing out...
SECURITY_QUESTION_LENGTH_REQUIREMENT_1: Your security answer should be at least
SECURITY_QUESTION_LOGOUT_WARNING: If tú make any changes, tú will be logged out of Opal and tú will need to log in again.
SERVER_ERROR_MODIFY_SECURITY: Server problem: the security questions or answers cannot be modified at this time. Please try again later.
SERVER_ERROR_SUBMIT_ANSWER: Server problem: the answer cannot be submitted. Please try again later.
SERVER_ERROR_SUBMIT_QUESTIONNAIRE: Server problem: the questionnaire cannot be submitted. Please try again later.
